data.detail: enable/disable settings per server for all device sensors

permissions.purpose: No runtime permissions are declared or requested by this screen itself. Sensor-specific permissions are handled by individual sensor managers.

data.purpose: When the user toggles a sensor's enabled state in Sensor Management, the change is persisted to the Room database and propagated to the sensor manager which may start or stop data collection.

permissions.purpose: No runtime permissions are declared or requested by this screen itself. Sensor-specific permissions are handled by individual sensor managers.
